extension.summary: Syncher - Scene Streamer with AI Music, Debrid, Trakt, Deezer, Radio
extension.description: Syncher v3.3.0 by zeus768 - Browse Movies, TV Shows, Sports Highlights and a massive Music section. AI Daily Playlists powered by Emergent Universal Key (like Spotify Daily Mix), Mood playlists, Decade playlists, Similar Artist AI mixes. Live Radio via Radio Browser API (20+ genres, 20 countries). Full Deezer integration for genres, artists, albums, charts, curated playlists, user playlists with shuffle/sort/export/import and autoplay. Scene release scrapers (RapidRAR, PSA, RapidMoviez, TFPDL, WatchSeriesHD, RLSbb, DDLValley, SceneSource) plus sports replay sites. Resolves through Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox. Trakt browsing, watchlists, scrobbling. TMDB metadata.
extension.disclaimer: This addon does not host any content. A debrid service or RapidRAR.cr premium account is recommended. AI features require an Emergent Universal Key.
extension.news:
v3.3.0 (2026) - NEW: AI Daily Playlists powered by Emergent Universal Key * 14 rotating daily themes (Discovery, Chill, Throwback, Workout, etc.) * Mood-based playlists (Happy, Sad, Chill, Party, Focus, Workout, etc.) * Decade playlists (60s through 2020s best-of) * "Similar To..." AI artist mix on any artist page * All AI playlists cached daily for speed - NEW: Live Radio via Radio Browser API (30,000+ stations) * Browse by genre (20 categories), country (20 countries) * Top voted, most popular, trending stations * Search radio stations - NEW: Enhanced playlists * Shuffle play mode * Sort by artist or title * Export playlist as text * Import playlist from text - AI powered by Emergent Universal Key (set in Settings)
v3.2.0 (2026) - Rich Music section with Deezer API integration - Music genres, artists, albums, top charts, curated playlists - User-created playlists with add/remove tracks - Auto-play mode for albums and playlists - Music scene site search
v3.1.1 (2026) - Version bump and metadata updates
v2.0.0 (2026) - Initial release: Movies, TV, Sports, Debrid, Trakt, TMDB
